content.speakerText: So, what do you usually do to unwind after work?
content.speakerTextCn: 那你平时下班后怎么放松啊？

options.text: I’m big into painting—I just finished a landscape last week.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了具体活动（painting）和时间细节（last week），符合‘用具体例子回应’的要求。其他选项要么太笼统（watching TV），要么消极（work, work...），要么模糊（maybe something），无法促进深入对话。

content.speakerText: No way! I just hiked the same trail last month—was the view as epic as you said?
content.speakerTextCn: 真的吗？我上个月刚走过那条路，风景真有你说的那么棒？

options.text: I don’t know, I wasn’t there.
Totally! I saw a fox and the sunrise turned the sky orange—unforgettable.

content.explanation: 正确答案用‘Totally!’回应惊喜，并加入具体细节（fox, sunrise, orange sky）强化情感连接。选项1回避问题，选项3弱化体验，选项4转移话题，均不符合‘强化连接感’的要求。

content.speakerText: What’s your favorite way to spend a weekend?

options.text: I’ve been getting into pottery classes—I made a mug last Saturday!
I sleep in and eat pizza.
I don’t do much on weekends.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了具体活动（pottery classes）和时间细节（last Saturday），体现兴趣深度，符合‘通过兴趣开启深入对话’的主题。选项1和4太模糊，选项3虽具体但缺乏积极互动感，不利于延续对话。

content.template: I’m big into ___—last weekend I went to the mountains.
content.hint: 这是描述爱好时的高频动词搭配，表示‘热衷于’
content.knowledgePoint: be big into + 活动（表达兴趣的固定搭配）

content.template: No way! I ___ the same trail last month!
content.hint: 回应惊喜时，用过去式动词强调亲身经历，与对方形成共鸣
content.knowledgePoint: 动词过去式用于分享亲身经历（强化共同点）

content.template: I’ve recently gotten into ___—I joined a book club last week.
content.hint: 表达新近培养的兴趣，用‘get into + 名词/动名词’
content.knowledgePoint: get into + 动名词（表达新兴趣的口语高频结构）

content.speakerText: So, what do you usually do to unwind after work?
content.speakerTextCn: 那你平时下班后怎么放松啊？
expectedAnswers: I’m into photography—I took some shots of the sunset last Friday.
I cook new recipes every weekend. Last night I tried Thai curry for the first time!
I play guitar. I’ve been learning a new song this month.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否用具体活动回应，而非泛泛而谈（如‘看电影’）
语言准确性：语法是否正确，动词时态是否匹配（如用过去式描述经历）
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化表达（如‘I’m into...’, ‘I’ve been...’）
关键词覆盖：是否包含兴趣类关键词（hiking, cooking, photography, playing）

content.speakerText: No way! I just hiked the same trail last month—was the view as epic as you said?
content.speakerTextCn: 真的吗？我上个月刚走过那条路，风景真有你说的那么棒？
expectedAnswers: Absolutely! I saw a hawk circling above the valley—it gave me chills!
Kinda, but the fog made it feel magical in a different way.
You too? That’s so cool! Did you see the waterfall near the third bend?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应对方的惊喜并强化共同经历
语言准确性：是否正确使用表达惊讶的口语词（No way!, Totally!, So cool!）
表达自然度：是否自然延续对话，而非简单重复或回避
关键词覆盖：是否包含具体自然元素（hawk, fog, waterfall）增强画面感

content.speakerText: What’s something you’ve been getting into lately?
expectedAnswers: I’ve been learning to knit—I made a scarf for my sister last week!
I started journaling every morning. It’s helped me feel more grounded.
I’ve been trying out yoga. I even joined a class on Saturdays now.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达新近培养的兴趣
语言准确性：是否正确使用‘get into’或‘start/try out’等表达新兴趣的结构
表达自然度：是否包含时间细节（last week, every morning, now）增强真实感
关键词覆盖：是否使用兴趣类动词（learning, journaling, trying out）
